title_en: Meeting People, Age, and Quantity Questions
petrov_stage: Turn the room outward into meeting people, age, and quantity dialogue.
petrov_mission: Meet someone politely, ask age or quantity questions, and answer without freezing.
focus_targets: Age uses 岁, not 年

listening_tasks.prompt: Listen for one of these lesson anchors and identify the intent: 高兴, 知道, 认识, 高兴认识你.
Listen to a line that uses 认识 versus 知道 and Age uses 岁, not 年 and repeat the key detail correctly.

reading_tasks.prompt: Match these lesson items to their meanings: 高兴, 知道, 认识, 高兴认识你.
Rebuild one short sentence that uses 认识 versus 知道 with one lesson vocabulary item.

speaking_tasks.prompt: Meet someone politely, ask age or quantity questions, and answer without freezing.
Say in Chinese: I am glad to meet you.

rapid_recall: Recall and say: 高兴, 知道, 认识, 高兴认识你, 岁.
Translate into Chinese: I do not have Chinese friends.
mock_pass_criteria: Uses at least two of these lesson anchors correctly: 高兴, 知道, 认识.
Produces one correct spoken line using 认识 versus 知道.
Answers one follow-up without dropping completely out of Chinese.
